mapper.select: { CALL ${schema}..USP_COMM_TEMPLT_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exclTmplType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{a ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{b ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{c ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{d ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{f ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{g ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{h ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{i ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{j ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{k ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{l ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{m ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{o ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{p ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{q ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{r ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{s ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{u ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{v ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{w ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{x ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{y ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{z ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
